DEFENDANTS LIVING INTENTIONS AND JOSHUA MCHUGH'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING JOSE AMEZCUA TO ATTEND DEPOSITION AND FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Ashwin V. Ladva, Esq. of Ladva Law Firm 296-8844 for pltf; Ellen P. Rosenbluth, Esq. of Frankel & Goldware, LLP 925/355-9800 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Discussed as to issue re proper service of the motion. The Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANTS $1246.80 WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Not reported
